internal_issues.description: WIN-005 CHAOS-7 DOI 10.1186/s40623-020-01163-9 is wrong — links to different paper in same journal. Correct DOI: 10.1186/s40623-020-01252-9 (Olsen et al. 2020 CHAOS-7).

internal_issues.description: SEC-5.15 Schumann direction error: section says dome 'computes' Schumann using f=c/4H₀ (f is output). Correct: 7.83 Hz is INPUT to derive H₀=c/4f. Using exponential H(r) yields ~22 Hz (self-contradiction in Sec 4.5.1).
